title: Sakana: Fable 5 Intelligence WITHOUT Fable 5!
summary: Sakana released Fugu, a multi-agent orchestration system with a standard and higher-end "Fugu Ultra" variant that uses panel-style synthesis of multiple model responses. The system is accessible via a single model API and reportedly matches frontier models like Claude and others on benchmarks.
writeup: This video covers Sakana's release of Fugu, a multi-agent orchestration system offered in a standard version and a higher-end "Fugu Ultra" variant that uses panel-style synthesis of multiple model responses. It matters because the system is accessible through a single model API and reportedly matches frontier models such as Claude on benchmarks. The key takeaways: orchestrating multiple models and synthesizing their outputs can reach frontier-level results, and the concepts in play include agent orchestration, model pruning, and test-time compute.
